# CSS variables for theming in AgentExtensionSelect (2026-03-10 11:14Z)

_**User**_

Read and update `d:\web development\test\src\pages\AgentExtensionSelect.css` to use CSS variables for theming. Replace these hardcoded colors:

Color → Variable mapping:
- `#0f172a` → `var(--bg-page)`
- `#1e293b` → `var(--bg-surface)` or `var(--bg-input)` for input/select backgrounds
- `#334155` → `var(--border-default)` for borders, `var(--bg-elevated)` for backgrounds
- `#475569` → `var(--border-subtle)`
- `#64748b` → `var(--text-placeholder)`
- `#94a3b8` → `var(--text-muted)`
- `#cbd5e1` → `var(--text-label)`
- `#e2e8f0` → `var(--text-secondary)`
- `#f1f5f9` → `var(--text-primary)`
- `rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.6)` → `var(--bg-overlay)`

DO NOT change accent/status colors (blues, greens, reds, ambers, purples). Those stay the same.

Use the StrReplace tool for each change.

---

_**Agent (model composer-1.5, mode Agent)**_

`AgentExtensionSelect.css` is updated to use CSS variables for theming. Summary of changes:

| Original | Replaced with |
|----------|----------------|
| `#1e293b` | `var(--bg-surface)` |
| `#334155` | `var(--border-default)` (2 uses) |
| `#f1f5f9` | `var(--text-primary)` (2 uses) |
| `#94a3b8` | `var(--text-muted)` (3 uses) |
| `#cbd5e1` | `var(--text-label)` |
| `#0f172a` | `var(--bg-page)` |

Accent and status colors (blues, greens, reds) are unchanged. No linter issues were introduced.
